title: Axolotl illagers SFX
description: ♡ This resource pack swaps: illagers SFX ➜ Axolotl SFX!! ♬
body:
![♡](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yK3H8JDU/images/34cb2a9732ce8d90f51bd0165fd7b04b8b507d77.png)

## ♡ Axolotl illagers **(but with sounds!)** ♡
⁣
> A simple **Resource Pack** that swaps **Default illagers SFX** with Original Minecraft Axolotl sounds!

⁣ Goes with the [Axolotl illagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-illagers) **Texture pack** by [Raphaxolotlz](https://modrinth.com/user/Raphaxolotlz)

⁣

Full experience with: [Axolotl Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-villagers) by [Raphaxolotlz](https://modrinth.com/user/Raphaxolotlz) + [Axolotl Villagers SFX](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-villagers-sfx) by [Me](https://modrinth.com/user/enenoir)!

⁣

### ♡ A Special Thanks to [@Raphaxolotlz](https://modrinth.com/user/Raphaxolotlz) ♡
For making one of the cutest illagers ResourcePack out there!! ♡
